narrative:
Belpre Twp township has 2,902 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
